sutta: [Music] monks 5 are the lost in hell who live fastering incurable what 5 by him has his mother been deprived of life his father and arahant by him with evil thought has a tatargata's blood been drawn by him has the sangha been embroiled or split verily monks these are the 5 lost in hell who lie festering incurable as the end of the suta
commentary: this suta refers to the 5 most heavy karma that a person can do people which will bring him to hell for a long long time the first 1 he kills his mother second 1 he kills his father third 1 he kills an arahant fourth 1 intentionally he causes the buddha to bleed that means he harms a buddha the fifth 1 he causes uh a harmonious sangha of man of manga to to be divided he becomes about to appear he causes the the monks to split and that is a very heavy karma the next suta is

items: intentionally causes the Buddha to bleed
causes a harmonious Sangha to be divided
